scope: Battle Command map-selection comparison cards showing recommendation reasons and after-action roles
steps: Opened the local app at the strategic map.
Clicked `幕舎で準備する`, `出撃配置へ`, and `選抜部隊で戦闘開始`, waiting about 3 seconds after each action.
Ran the battle at `3倍` until enemy groups spawned, clicked `停止`, and selected a visible enemy map token.
Verified the comparison cards displayed recommendation text and `戦果役割` labels.
Clicked `敵前縁へ布陣` and verified the selected brigade command summary still updated anchor/fallback and pending command transmission.

recommendationsVisible: 推奨: 敵群を基準目標化して前縁を押さえる
推奨: 既存守備と予備に接続して戦線を固める
推奨: 施設任務を明確化して防衛/修理教訓を残す
afterActionRolesVisible: 戦果役割 検査敵前縁布陣
戦果役割 検査戦線転属
戦果役割 検査施設基準
verified.orderButtonStillWorks: After `敵前縁へ布陣`, selected command summary showed anchor `X45 Y48`, fallback `X29 Y48`, and pending `伝令 3秒 / 集中射撃`.

notes: This pass remains UI-only over existing comparison and result-role paths.
Mobile/cellphone QA remains outside the current target.
